main.description: A single Ecdysium run, autosaved to the player's repo. One record per player (rkey 'self') — the web build's single-slot save. `stateJson` is the same versioned RunSnapshot envelope the native build writes to disk.

updatedAt.description: When this save was written, for last-write-wins sync across devices.

floor.description: Current dungeon floor at save time (optional, for display).
